summary: Heavy duty tape measure for construction and hardware distributors, with rubberized ABS case, steel blade, OEM logo, color, packaging, and export-ready QC support.
targetBuyers: Construction tool importers, hardware distributors, building supply wholesalers, industrial safety suppliers, and private-label tape measure brands
sellingPoints: Rubberized shock-resistant case for construction and jobsite channels
High-carbon steel blade with clear metric/inch printing options
Private-label logo, shell color, barcode and retail packaging support

specs.label: Material
specs.value: High-carbon steel tape, ABS shell, nylon lanyard, stainless steel hook, belt clip

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Logo label or printing, Pantone shell color, blade specification, hook, belt clip, lanyard, barcode, carton mark, and retail packaging

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: OPP bag, color box, blister card, display box, export carton, buyer barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ, to be confirmed by order details

specs.label: Lead time
specs.value: Custom logo samples ready in about 3 days. Bulk lead time can be negotiated based on order quantity and packaging requirements.

title: Heavy Duty Tape Measure
quality: Blade printing, measurement readability, and surface coating check
Lock button, retraction speed, hook rivet, and belt clip function test
Drop-resistance, case assembly, lanyard, and surface appearance inspection
Retail packaging, barcode label, carton mark, and pre-shipment quantity review
